nodes.name: Chicken Fajita Bowl — Berry Boost Plate
nodes.description: name: Chicken Fajita Bowl — Berry Boost Plate | short_description: Protein-forward fajita bowl with chicken, peppers, onions, rice, and avocado; optional berries boost antioxidants for a Berry Boost.
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Chicken Fajita Bowl — Berry Boost Plate - name: Chicken Fajita Bowl — Berry Boost Plate | short_description: Protein-forward fajita bowl with chicken, peppers, onions, rice, and avocado; optional berries boost antioxidants for a Berry Boost. | meal_suggestion: Grill or sauté chicken with peppers and onions, serve over cooked rice, and top with sliced avocado. Add a side of berries to boost antioxidants and fiber if desired. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich chicken with peppers and onions offers lean protein and fiber; rice provides carbohydrates; avocado adds heart-healthy fats. For extra fiber and antioxidants, consider adding a side of berries (Berry Boost).

nodes.name: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Classic Wrap
nodes.description: name: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Classic Wrap | short_description: Protein-rich stuffed peppers with ground turkey, rice, tomato sauce, and cheddar in a colorful pepper shell. | meal_suggestion: Serve war
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Classic Wrap - name: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Classic Wrap | short_description: Protein-rich stuffed peppers with ground turkey, rice, tomato sauce, and cheddar in a colorful pepper shell. | meal_suggestion: Serve warm with a side salad or steamed greens. One pepper per serving; pair with salsa or Greek yogurt for extra creaminess, or swap rice for cauliflower rice to reduce carbs. | nutrition_note: Balanced: lean turkey provides protein, rice offers carbohydrates, and peppers add fiber; cheddar adds calcium and flavor. Monitor sodium from tomato sauce; lighter options include lean turkey, brown rice, and reduced-fat cheese.

nodes.name: Baked Salmon Plate — Berry Boost Twist
nodes.description: name: Baked Salmon Plate — Berry Boost Twist | short_description: A baked salmon plate with lemon, vegetables, and rice, plus an optional Berry Boost Twist by adding berries for extra antioxidants. |
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Baked Salmon Plate — Berry Boost Twist - name: Baked Salmon Plate — Berry Boost Twist | short_description: A baked salmon plate with lemon, vegetables, and rice, plus an optional Berry Boost Twist by adding berries for extra antioxidants. | meal_suggestion: Bake a 4–6 oz salmon fillet with lemon. Serve with 1 cup cooked rice and 1–2 cups mixed vegetables. For the Berry Boost Twist, add a handful of fresh berries on the side or a light berry glaze. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich salmon provides omega-3 fats (EPA/DHA) and high-quality protein. Mixed vegetables supply fiber and micronutrients; lemon adds vitamin C. Rice contributes carbohydrates for energy; brown rice can boost fiber. Berry Boost Twist suggests adding berries (blueberries, strawberries, etc.) for antioxidant benefits.
